title: Chore: Add Dependabot for dependency updates
original_text: Added Dependabot for automated dependency updates. Configured Dependabot for npm and pip dependencies. Added automated pull requests for security updates. Implemented dependency review process. Added dependency version pinning. Result: Dependabot operational.
expected_subject: chore(deps): add Dependabot for dependency updates
expected_body_lines: - Configure Dependabot for npm and pip dependencies
- Add automated pull requests for security updates
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(deps): add Dependabot for dependency updates"
